commentary_links.hebrew: וּמוֹלְדוֹתַ֗יִךְ בְּי֨וֹם הוּלֶּ֤דֶת אוֹתָךְ֙ לֹא־כׇרַּ֣ת שׇׁרֵּ֔ךְ וּבְמַ֥יִם לֹא־רֻחַ֖צְתְּ לְמִשְׁעִ֑י וְהׇמְלֵ֙חַ֙ לֹ֣א הֻמְלַ֔חַתְּ וְהׇחְתֵּ֖ל לֹ֥א חֻתָּֽלְתְּ׃
commentary_links.english: As for your birth, when you were born your navel cord was not cut, and you were not bathed in water to smooth you;asmooth you Meaning of Heb. uncertain. you were not rubbed with salt, nor were you swaddled.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: הולדת אותך לא כרת שרך ובמים לא רחצת למשעי והמלח לא המלחת

commentary_links.hebrew: שֹׁמֵ֣ר פְּתָאיִ֣ם יְהֹוָ֑ה דַּ֝לֹּתִ֗י וְלִ֣י יְהוֹשִֽׁיעַ׃
commentary_links.english:
GOD protects the simple;
I was saved, after having been brought low.
